---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    papersize: letter
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - top=15mm
      - left=14mm
      - right=10mm
      - bottom=15mm
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    urlcolor: blue
    include-in-header:
      - file: preamble.tex
---

{{< include sections/header.qmd >}}

\vspace{28pt}

{{< include sections/contact/info.qmd >}}

\cvrule

{{< include sections/technical_skills.qmd >}}

\cvrule

\cvrow{EDUCATION}{%
{{< include sections/education/northgate.qmd >}}

  \vspace{6pt}

{{< include sections/education/clearwater.qmd >}}
}

\cvrule

\cvrow{WORK\\EXPERIENCE}{%
{{< include sections/work/grad_ra.qmd >}}
}

\vspace{6pt}

\cvrow{}{%
{{< include sections/work/ta_ml_course.qmd >}}
}

\vspace{6pt}

\cvrow{}{%
{{< include sections/work/ra_embedded.qmd >}}
}

\cvrule

\cvrow{SERVICE \&\\LEADERSHIP}{%
{{< include sections/service/laes_president.qmd >}}
}

\cvrule

\cvrow{HONORS AND\\AWARDS}{%
{{< include sections/awards/excellence_fellowship.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/awards/ml_symposium.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/awards/summa_cum_laude.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/awards/national_hispanic.qmd >}}
}
